nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
nodes.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、环颈鸭、赤琵嘴鴨等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-winged becard
nodes.summary: White-winged becard（White-winged becard，学名 Pachyramphus polychopterus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省
nodes.summary: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括棕头草雁、Red-and-white crake、查科林鴞等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-winged becard (Pachyramphus polychopterus) is a species of bird in the family Tityridae, the tityras, becards, and allies. It is found in every Central American country except El Salvador, on Trinidad and Tobago, and in every mainland South American country except Chile.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: III | title =Birds of Peru | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =revised and updated |series=Princeton Field Guides | date =2010 | location =Princeton, NJ | pages =480 |isbn = 978-0691130231 }} northwestern Bolivia east across southern Brazil and south through Paraguay, Uruguay, and northern Argentina to Buenos Aires Province The white-winged becard inhabits a wide variety of landscapes in the tropical and lower subtropical zones. Most of them are somewhat open, including the edges and clearings of evergreen forest, gallery and riparian forest, secondary forest, shaded plantations, and river islands

links.evidence: It sometimes occurs in mangroves and in re-growing várzea forest.
